import React from 'react'; import './DashboardPage.css'; const recentActivities = [ { icon: '📤', name: 'File uploaded to Network Share', meta: '2 min ago', pill: 'upload' }, { icon: '💻', name: 'Peer connected', meta: '5 min ago', pill: 'peer' }, { icon: '👥', name: 'Joined new group', meta: '12 min ago', pill: 'group' }, { icon: '🔄', name: 'Transfer completed', meta: '18 min ago', pill: 'transfer' }, { icon: '📄', name: 'Document shared', meta: '25 min ago', pill: 'upload' }, ]; const DashboardPage = ({ stats, peersCount, groups, setView, selectGroup, fetchStats }) => { return (

Dashboard

Real-time overview of your usage • Updates every 5 seconds

👥

Groups

{stats.groupCount || 0}

Active groups
📄

Files

{stats.fileCount || 0}

Files uploaded
💻

Peers Online

{stats.peersOnline || 0}

Devices on network

⚡ Quick Actions

Recent Activity

{recentActivities.map((a, i) => (
{a.icon}
{a.name} {a.meta}
{a.pill === 'upload' ? 'Upload' : a.pill === 'peer' ? 'Peer' : a.pill === 'group' ? 'Group' : 'Transfer'}
))}
); }; export default DashboardPage;
